issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-flask-signalbox-configs for the Python/HARD gate by adding three interacting bulletin-log semantics—coupling cascade on full revokes (with decouple opt-out), defer_until rows that flush after their trigger bulletin finishes (including post-release restore), and supersedes voiding of lower-seq rows before the superseding row applies. Updated seed_evidence.py with six new log rows and yard-link coupling on BUL-F/M/P, extended the resolution engine in tests/helpers.py and solution/repair_cartridge.py, added five matching pytest cases, documented the new rules in instruction.md, bumped Dockerfile platform-revision to r17, and refreshed submission explanations and rubrics.
